summary: Completed comprehensive RBAC endpoint restrictions testing. All 34 backend tests passed. Fixed 2 frontend bugs: (1) Operator redirect to /admin/bookings after login, (2) Manual booking button hidden for operators. All role-based navigation and endpoint access working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Operator login was redirecting to /admin/dashboard instead of /admin/bookings. Updated AdminLoginPage handleSubmit to check user role and redirect accordingly.
Fixed: Manual booking button was visible to operators. Added conditional rendering: {onManualCreate && <Button>...} in BookingsView component.
RBAC implementation is comprehensive with proper endpoint restrictions using require_role decorator.
Financial data stripping for operators working correctly - program_price, deposit_amount, balance_amount, overall_payment_status, program_snapshot are removed.
Operator payment_status correctly simplified to 'Paid' or 'Pending' instead of 'Verified'/'Pending Review'.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test users during testing: test_admin_rbac_*, test_operator_rbac_*, test_admin_ui@test.com, test_operator_ui@test.com, test_operator_redirect@test.com, test_operator_final@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC endpoint restrictions fully tested. Key findings: (1) Superadmin has full access to all endpoints, (2) Admin can access dashboard, bookings, email-logs, programs/capacity GET, but NOT settings, programs POST/PUT, capacity PUT, (3) Operator can ONLY access bookings (with financial data stripped) and documents, cannot access dashboard, settings, programs POST, capacity PUT, email-logs, manual booking. Operator PATCH booking restricted to status field only. Frontend navigation correctly shows/hides items based on role. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_rbac_endpoints.py

features_tested.superadmin_nav_items: ✓ All 8 items visible (dashboard, operations-screen, bookings, weekly-operations, programs, capacity, users, settings)
features_tested.admin_nav_items: ✓ 5 items visible (dashboard, operations-screen, bookings, weekly-operations, users), 3 hidden (programs, capacity, settings)
features_tested.operator_financial_data_stripped: ✓ program_price, deposit_amount, balance_amount, overall_payment_status, program_snapshot NOT in response
features_tested.operator_booking_detail_stripped: ✓ Financial fields removed from detail view
